sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Flight/Floating
special_mechanics.description: Master has functional wings and can fly, float to platforms, and navigate through dungeons using flight mechanics

physics_values.notes: Exact flight speed and acceleration not documented

special_mechanics.name: Vertical Movement Modes
special_mechanics.description: Player navigates dungeons by jumping, flying, falling, and floating to platforms

tier_notes: Tier 2 - empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics description but no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, gravity values, acceleration rates). Master character has wings enabling flight as core mechanic distinct from original ActRaiser.
